header.title: Badge
header.subtitle: Compact label for status, category, or metadata. Supports six semantic color variants, an optional leading icon, and a chip mode with a dismissible remove button.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: A badge is an inline container with optional leading icon, label text, and optional remove button (chip mode).

parts.icon: Optional leading icon rendered before the label text.
parts.label: The visible text content of the badge.
parts.remove: Optional close button shown when onRemove is provided. Requires aria-label for accessibility.

variants.title: Variants
variants.description: Six semantic variants map to design token color pairs. The accent variant is the default.

leadingIcon.title: Leading icon
leadingIcon.description: Attach a small icon before the label for additional context.

chipMode.title: Chip mode
chipMode.description: Add onRemove + aria-label to turn a badge into a dismissible chip. The remove button is always accessible via keyboard.

props.title: Props
props.description: Extends all native <span> attributes. Component-specific props listed below.

props.variant: Color variant. One of: accent (default), neutral, success, warning, error, info.
props.leadingIcon: ReactNode rendered before the label text.
props.onRemove: Callback fired when the remove button is clicked. When provided, a remove button is displayed.
props.ariaLabel: Required when onRemove is set. Labels the remove button for screen readers.
